title: Upgrade x/sigil to v2 effective activity height migration (v0.8.0)
summary: Apply the x/sigil v1 -> v2 state migration to rebuild active liveness indexes from MaxPulseHeight() semantics. State migration only, no new stores.
details: Upgrade x/sigil from v1 to v2. Rebuild the active liveness index from raw LastActiveHeight semantics to effective activity height via MaxPulseHeight(). This is a state migration only and introduces no new module stores or public API changes.
vote_option_context: YES = approve the v0.8.0 x/sigil migration. NO = reject and keep current chain state. ABSTAIN = count toward quorum without preference. NO_WITH_VETO = reject as harmful.
